rationale: r2c0's offer of 0.625 kWh aligns with conservative sharing—their SoC (0.44) exceeds our minimum threshold (0.5), they're targeting below-mean peers via geographic distribution, and modest contribution supports collective resilience without compromising our outage survival margin.
